summary: Comprehensive testing of new P2P Exchange order book and balance reservation features completed. All backend APIs (28 tests) and frontend UI components working correctly. New features verified: public offers endpoint, payment method filters, offer creation with amount_usdt field, balance reservation on offer creation, balance return on offer deletion, duplicate requisite type validation.
passed_tests: GET /api/public/offers returns active offers (200 OK)
Public offers only returns active offers with available_usdt > 0
Public offers have all required fields (id, trader_login, price_rub, payment_methods, amount_usdt, available_usdt)
Payment method filter by 'card' works correctly
Payment method filter by 'sbp' works correctly
Payment method filter 'all' returns same as no filter
Sort by price (ascending) works correctly
Sort by amount (descending) works correctly
Sort by rating (descending) works correctly
Creating offer reserves amount_usdt from trader balance
Offer has amount_usdt and available_usdt fields
Insufficient balance error returned when amount > balance
Duplicate requisite type rejected (backend returns 400)
Different requisite types allowed (card + sbp)
Deleting offer returns available_usdt to trader balance
Offers show trader_login
Offers show price_rub (rate)
Offers show available_usdt
Offers show payment_methods or requisites
Offers show conditions field
Offers show trades_count
Offers show success_rate
Landing page shows 'Стакан объявлений' header
Landing page has payment method filter dropdown
Landing page has sort filter dropdown
Landing page shows offer items with trader, rate, amount, payment methods, trades count
Payment filter changes number of displayed offers
Offer creation form has 'Сумма к продаже (USDT)' field
Offer creation form shows balance reservation notice
Offer creation form has requisites selection section
Offer creation form has conditions field
Frontend validates duplicate requisite type selection
Balance decreases after offer creation (6283.77 -> 6258.77 USDT for 25 USDT offer)
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in BrowserRouter/Auth - minor React state management issue, not affecting functionality
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility improvement needed for dialog components
updated_files: /app/tests/test_offer_orderbook.py - Created comprehensive test suite for order book and balance reservation features
seed_data_creation: Created test requisites (card, sbp) and offers for testing balance reservation flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new order book and balance reservation features verified: (1) GET /api/public/offers returns active offers with filters (payment_method, sort_by). (2) Offers display trader_login, price_rub, available_usdt, payment_methods/requisites, conditions, trades_count, success_rate. (3) Offer creation uses amount_usdt field (not min/max), reserves from trader balance. (4) Backend validates duplicate requisite types (returns 400). (5) Frontend validates duplicate requisite types (shows toast error). (6) Deleting offer returns available_usdt to trader balance. (7) Landing page shows order book with filters working correctly.
